name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, empty media folders, and orphaned subtitles. Repairs broken .strm files and symlinks. Scheduled Seerr cleanup of unavailable Overseerr/Jellyseerr media requests. Provides media library statistics with video/audio codec analysis, resolution/container breakdown, dynamic range detection (HDR10, HDR10+, Dolby Vision, HLG, SDR), health checks (embedded subtitle detection), caching, ML-powered smart recommendations per user with four scoring strategies (heuristic, learned, neural, ensemble) including adaptive 3-way blending with sigmoid-based alpha/beta transition, collaborative filtering, and watch profile analysis, user activity insights with play count and completion tracking, library insights (largest directories & recent changes), historical trends, trash/recycle bin with detailed contents UI, multi-instance Arr stack integration (up to 3 Radarr + 3 Sonarr) with connection testing and collapsible UI, plugin-specific log viewer with download and filtering, unsaved settings protection, and a multi-language 8-tab dashboard (en, de, fr, es, pt, zh, tr).
overview: Automated cleanup (trickplay, empty folders, subtitles, link repair for .strm & symlinks), Seerr request cleanup, media statistics with codec/health/dynamic-range analysis, ML-powered smart recommendations per user, user activity insights, library insights, trends, trash bin, plugin log viewer, multi-instance Arr integration with collapsible UI, unsaved settings alert, and multi-language 8-tab dashboard.

versions.changelog: v2.0.0.0: New Discover tab using an ensemble ML model to provide tailored content recommendations. This update also introduces granular activity tracking and improved system cleanup for uninstallation of this plugin. 2032 tests.

v1.2.1.0: Statistics refactored to use Jellyfin MediaStream metadata (replaces filename parsing). Dynamic range detection (HDR10, HDR10+, Dolby Vision, HLG, SDR). Extended resolution classification (8K, 1440p, SD). Differentiated audio codecs (TrueHD Atmos, DTS-X, DTS-HD MA, EAC3 Atmos). Donut chart enhancements with dynamic range visualization. Library Insights in Trends tab (top-10 largest directories, recently added/changed items, per-library size breakdown with 15-min cache). Performance improvement via per-item video stream caching. Documentation updated.

v1.2.0.0: Seerr Cleanup Task (scheduled cleanup of unavailable Overseerr/Jellyseerr media requests), Unsaved Settings Alert (dirty-tracking with discard/save/cancel dialog), Collapsible Arr/Seerr sections with dynamic instance count, Auto-Save Dropdowns (task modes + language save instantly with ✔/✘ indicator), Link Repair enhanced with symlink support, Auto-Init Scan on first visit, Scroll Position Restore after language change and backup import, 4-part versioning, meta.json fixes.
v1.1.0: Performance optimizations for GrowthTimelineService and BackupService, refactored monolith services, improved cross-platform compatibility, Trends UI enhancements.

v1.0.9: Removed legacy statistics history (replaced by growth timeline), removed Export/CSV endpoints, new StatisticsCacheService, legacy history file cleanup, growth timeline interpolation & deduplication, reduced backup size limit, 957 tests.
v1.0.8: Project restructure, bug fix for Jellyfin versions below 10.11.8, backup/restore data, enhanced TrendChart, relocated download buttons, responsive Data Tree for touch devices.

v1.0.7: Added i18n support (EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, TR, ZH), scheduled task for cleaning empty media folders, trend chart visualization, configurable intervals, and automatic plugin data directory creation.
Exclude trash folders from media statistics, fix false positives for orphaned TV show metadata directories, fix trash disable dialog in UI.

Multi-instance Arr support (up to 3 Radarr + 3 Sonarr), Arr connection test endpoint, persisted latest scan results (survives restarts), post-cleanup statistics scan, embedded subtitle detection in health checks, video vs music audio codec split, codec file path tracking with clickable drill-down, trash contents detail API, trash folder management UI, trash disable dialog, other file tracking, 6-tab modular dashboard (Overview/Codecs/Health/Trends/Settings/Arr), modular CSS/JS build system, XSS protection, boxset/collection health check skipping, comprehensive README rewrite, 573 tests.

Added STRM file repair task, unified TaskMode system (Activate/DryRun/Deactivate per task), single master HelperCleanupTask replacing separate scheduled tasks, fixed ConfigVersion not preserved on settings save, fixed DI resolution for System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem, updated README, 315 tests.

Fixed plugin logo 404 (logo.png now included as physical file in release ZIP with meta.json imagePath), fixed SanitizeFileName null-char handling, removed duplicate Cleanup Statistics UI section, removed unused GetThumbImage method, 244 tests.

Fixed subtitle false positives (explicit ISO 639 allowlists instead of naive 2-3 letter heuristic), moved SubtitleFlags/KnownLanguageCodes to MediaExtensions, ArrIntegrationService now uses IHttpClientFactory, CleanupTrackingService thread-safety with lock, specific exception handling, removed _ = ex anti-pattern, 244 tests.
Fixed config page not loading (script/style tags moved inside page div), plugin now visible in Jellyfin sidebar menu with EnableInMainMenu, updated test count to 212.

Initial release with trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, orphaned subtitle cleaner, media statistics dashboard, audio codec analysis, export (JSON/CSV), historical trends, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr), multi-language dashboard (en/de/fr/es/pt/zh/tr), library include/exclude lists, and 196 tests.
